training_status: maintains heavy weight training, considering HIIT workouts

benefits.description: Recommended as adjunct to cutting protocol with incline walking and HIIT

protocol_notes: Commenter suggesting protocol for others: MOTS-C 5mg 3x/week before workouts, incline walking daily, 2-3 HIIT workouts (prefer assault bike), heavy weight training, 200g+ protein daily, calorie deficit with fiber-rich carbs. Also mentions considering HGH, GHSP, and TRT if needed.
